output.summary: Successfully implemented three changes to Wide Social Media block: (1) Added md:ml-auto to nav element in both TSX and PHP for right-alignment when heading is empty, (2) Added showLabel boolean attribute (default true) on parent block passed via context to child items, (3) Conditionally render label and add title attribute to links when showLabel is false. All changes maintain TSX/PHP sync.

filesModified.purpose: Added showLabel boolean attribute (default true) and configured providesContext to pass it to child blocks
changes: Added attribute: showLabel (type: boolean, default: true)

filesModified.purpose: Added InspectorControls toggle for showLabel and md:ml-auto class to nav element
changes: Added showLabel?: boolean to WideSocialMediaAttributes type
Added InspectorControls with Display panel containing ToggleControl for showLabel
Added md:ml-auto class to nav element for right-alignment when heading is absent

filesModified.purpose: Added md:ml-auto class to nav element and showLabel to docblock
changes: Added md:ml-auto class to nav element

filesModified.purpose: Added usesContext to receive showLabel from parent block
Conditionally show/hide label based on context, add title attribute when hidden
changes: Added context to EditProps type with 'takt/wide-social-media/showLabel'
Added title attribute to <a> element when showLabel is false (uses label || link.title)
Added opacity-50 class to label RichText when showLabel is false for visual feedback in editor

filesModified.purpose: Conditionally render label and add title attribute based on context
changes: Read showLabel from block context (default true)
Created $titleAttr variable with label or linkTitle when showLabel is false
Added title attribute to <a> element when $titleAttr is not empty
Wrapped label <span> in conditional: only render when $showLabel is true

attributesAdded.name: showLabel
attributesAdded.description: Controls whether social media labels are visible. When false, only icons display with title tooltips on hover.

warnings: asset size limit: js/editor.js (347 KiB) - pre-existing
buildStatus.lintStatus: passed with pre-existing warnings in other blocks

details: md:ml-auto class added to nav element in both TSX and PHP
showLabel attribute properly passed via context in block.json
Label conditional rendering synced between TSX and PHP
Title attribute logic synced between TSX and PHP

newVariations: Labels Hidden (Icons Only via showLabel=false) - 4 items

implementationNotes.rightAlignmentFix: Added md:ml-auto to nav element. Works with justify-between when heading is present, provides right-alignment via auto-margin when heading is absent.
implementationNotes.showLabelContext: Follows existing pattern used by CardsCarousel, CardsGrid, and MasonryCards for parent-to-child attribute passing via block context.
implementationNotes.titleAttribute: Priority for title attribute: label > link.title. Provides hover tooltip when labels are hidden.
implementationNotes.editorExperience: Label always visible in editor with opacity-50 when showLabel is false, ensuring authors can edit label text even when hidden on frontend.
